name: RPlog_Interrogation_Training_Day_3_-_Xy_lear_Dagnmith
title: Interrogation Resistance Training, Day Three
summary: On the final day of the ISB resistance-training ordeal, the gentle young Agent Dorian Navtilos enters the cell of the broken, sleep-deprived pilot Liza Molokai, offering conversation rather than torture and coaching her on her chief weakness, excessive compassion. After he draws out her loyalty and her newfound resolve to focus on duty, the test escalates: CompForce troopers haul in the injured Petty Officer Xy'lear Dagnmith and threaten to beat him unless Liza surrenders her squadron's communication frequencies. Liza refuses, and Xy'lear, kneeling proudly, endures a brutal stun-baton beating that leaves him unconscious and bleeding while she watches with cold pride for the Empire. Dorian probes whether her earlier pleading turned to spite or jealousy, but Liza insists it is only honor and pride in a fellow officer. Concluding the test, Dorian has Xy'lear carted to medical, chides Liza for her cheekiness, and leaves her alone to slip into a troubled sleep as her captors decide her fate.
